title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines a six-step workflow for maximizing Claude project outcomes: web scraping for data discovery, ingesting sources into a knowledge base, iterative system improvement, leveraging multiple perspectives via board consultation, testing with focus groups, and compound engineering for shipping. The approach is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project and is applicable across different Claude tools like Code, Cowork, and Projects.
